breakdown: This PR fixes a bug where non-standard reward keys ('xp'/'gold_pieces' instead of 'xp_gained'/'gold') from LLM responses weren't being normalized in the streaming passthrough path. The solution adds a normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function that falls back to legacy keys and removes them after processing. Test coverage is strong with an E2E test that verifies the fix. Weaknesses include lack of type hints on the new function and minimal inline documentation beyond the existing WHY comment.
key_changes: Add normalize_rewards_box_for_ui function to handle 'xp'->'xp_gained' and 'gold_pieces'->'gold' fallback mapping
Call normalize_rewards_box_for_ui in _resolve_canonical_level_up_ui_pair for passthrough rewards
Remove raw legacy keys ('xp', 'gold_pieces') after normalization to ensure clean output
Add E2E test that forces LLM to produce messy rewards_box and verifies normalization works
Refactor streaming block logic to handle raw_structured_rewards_box and raw_structured_planning_block tuple unpacking
